---
title: "Some fun Field and Lab Work"
listing: 
  contents: fieldwork
  sort: false
  type: grid
  image-align: right
  max-description-length: 350
  date-format: medium
  categories: false
page-layout: article
freeze: auto
editor: source
toc: false
---

### I have been Having lots of fun this past year digging in the dirt collecting soil and water click through to learn about HABs in our oceans or Serpentine (Our state rock)!
